variants.name: 失眠患者
variants.ability: 每个夜晚，你会得知一个在当晚选择过你的角色。
variants.firstNightReminder: When a player picks the Insomniac, place the "Picked Insomniac" token next to them or, if it is already next to another player, leave it where it is. If a player has the "Picked Insomniac" token, show their character token to the Insomniac. Remove the "Picked Insomniac" token.
variants.otherNightReminder: When a player picks the Insomniac, place the "Picked Insomniac" token next to them or, if it is already next to another player, leave it where it is. If a player has the "Picked Insomniac" token, show their character token to the Insomniac. Remove the "Picked Insomniac" token.
